name: mail-agent
description: Agent-first mail, calendar, and contacts workflows with Fastmail and Google support.

interface.shortDescription: Read and automate provider-native mail workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Mail Agent to search inboxes, summarize threads, draft replies, send email, inspect calendars, and look up contacts through a local provider-native daemon for Fastmail and Google.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my inbox and draft the reply.
Review today's calendar and flag conflicts.
Find the latest thread with a contact.
